'''âw-b-l-j''' ('''kawablejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beath|beath]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beath|beath]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-b-l-j
|-
! Lemma
| kawablejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwablejoko|thiwablejoko]] || [[word:jiwablejoko|jiwablejoko]] || [[word:shiwablejoko|shiwablejoko]] || [[word:kiwablejoko|kiwablejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwablejoko|thuthuwablejoko]] || [[word:jujuwablejoko|jujuwablejoko]] || [[word:shushuwablejoko|shushuwablejoko]] || [[word:kukuwablejoko|kukuwablejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowablejoko|thowablejoko]] || [[word:jowablejoko|jowablejoko]] || [[word:showablejoko|showablejoko]] || [[word:kowablejoko|kowablejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwablejoko|thĂŠwablejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwablejoko|jĂŠwablejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwablejoko|shĂŠwablejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwablejoko|kĂŠwablejoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawablejoko|thawablejoko]] || [[word:jawablejoko|jawablejoko]] || [[word:shawablejoko|shawablejoko]] || [[word:kawablejoko|kawablejoko]]
|}
